title: Fresh Silky Uruguayan Midnight-Craving Empanadas
description: A delicious and crispy Uruguayan empanada recipe with a silky filling, perfect for a midnight craving. Made with a diabetic-friendly dough and a variety of ingredients.

ingredients.name: all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: use a low-carb flour for a diabetic-friendly option

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together flour and salt.
Add cubed butter and use a pastry blender or your fingertips to work it into the flour until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Beat eggs in a separate bowl and add to the flour mixture. Stir until dough forms.
Wrap dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
On a lightly floured surface, roll out dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of caramelized onions, diced ham, and feta cheese in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough in half over the filling and press the edges together with a fork to seal.
Use a brush to apply a beaten egg to the top of each empanada.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
